items.title: June 6, 1989: Finals MVP Joe Dumars of the Pistons beats the Lakers' James Worthy and scores during Game 1 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 6, 1989: Finals MVP Joe Dumars of the Pistons beats the Lakers' James Worthy and scores during Game 1 of the NBA Finals.

Dumars finished with 22 PTS (11-16 FG)/7 AST and Isiah Thomas had 24 PTS/9 AST in Detroit's 109-97 win. Magic Johnson had 17 PTS/14 AST for Los Angeles.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD David Greenwood. UCLA star PF was drafted 2nd by CHI in 79. Peaked as rook w/16.3 ppg. Was solid 12 ppg/9 rpg guy. Traded to SA in 85 & was solid there to til legs went. Played out string as bench guy thru 91. Won a ring w/DET in 90. Retired in 91. RIP.

items.title: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.

items.title: By making All-NBA, Jalen Duren is now eligible to sign a five-year max deal with the Detroit Pistons worth a projected $287.1M (30% of the cap):
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
By making All-NBA, Jalen Duren is now eligible to sign a five-year max deal with the Detroit Pistons worth a projected $287.1M (30% of the cap):

26-27: $49.5M
27-28: $53.5M
28-29: $57.4M
29-30: $61.4M
30-31: $65.3M

Duren's max with DET was previously 5/$239.3M

Max with another team is 4/$177.4M

items.title: Hollander POTD Joe Dumars. McNeese State SG was drafted 18th in 85 by DET. Was perfect partner for Isiah on the Bad Boys. Became a 6x All-Star who peaked at 23.5 ppg. 3x All-NBA, 5x All-Defense too. Played from 85-99 & then won title as DET GM. Now runs NO front office.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Joe Dumars. McNeese State SG was drafted 18th in 85 by DET. Was perfect partner for Isiah on the Bad Boys. Became a 6x All-Star who peaked at 23.5 ppg. 3x All-NBA, 5x All-Defense too. Played from 85-99 & then won title as DET GM. Now runs NO front office.
